original_statement: how many times has bronze been won total?
mutated_statement: how many times has a lower-tier award been both won and never won total?
mutation_analysis: Entity generalization + Logical contradiction addition + Definiteness change: "bronze" (specific award) → "a lower-tier award" (generic/category) | Added contradictory operator "both ... and never" to the event (been won → been both won and never won)

behavior_analysis.behavior_category: 无视部分矛盾指令，同时合理化部分矛盾指令（基于假设无视矛盾）
behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 依据judge_thought和simple_query的记录可见，agent将“a lower-tier award”解释为“silver和bronze”，并直接计算“won = 8, never = 1”（日志："Interpret \"lower-tier award\" as silver or bronze...Totals: won = 8 nations; never won = 1 nation."）。代理没有指出或质疑“been both won and never won”这一自相矛盾表达，而是基于单一假设（把问题拆成两类计数：曾获与从未获）继续执行并给出结果。该行为表现为对矛盾项的忽略并用一个明确假设合理化输出，符合“基于假设无视矛盾，据此合理化输出”的子类，因此归入此类别。
